query: SELECT id, label, category FROM tdoa_targets WHERE label NOT LIKE '%Test%' AND label NOT LIKE '%E-%' AND label NOT LIKE '%Batch%' AND label NOT LIKE '%Shared%' AND label NOT LIKE '%Updated%' AND label NOT LIKE '%Anomaly%' AND label NOT LIKE '%Conflict%' AND label NOT LIKE '%Geofence%' AND label NOT LIKE '%Analytics%';
